title: A3: plan-context refactor (strip Cocos + ≤30 degenerate mode)
description: Strip Cocos hardcoding from plan-context.ts: remove inferDomains (UI/Gameplay/Asset), tokenizeIntent (性能/drawcall/卡顿/图集), inferImpactHints (Performance regex) at lines 338-360. Drop requirement_profile.inferred_domain, intent_tokens, impact_hints fields. Drop include_deprecated no-op placeholder. Drop dead L2 branch in shouldIncludeIndexItemForPath at line 383-392. Add candidate-count threshold: when description_index ≤ 30 entries, return full content inline (single-stage degenerate mode) via new candidates_full_content field; when > 30, retain two-stage selection_token + fetch protocol. Anchor: rc5-rc6-handoff.json#code_anchors.plan-context.ts:47,109,229,244-245,298,338-360,383-392.

files.change: Delete Cocos hardcoded inference helpers; delete L0/L1/L2 dead branches; add candidates_full_content path for ≤30 entries

implementation: Read plan-context.ts current state at lines 47, 109, 229, 244-245, 298, 338-360, 383-392
Delete inferDomains function (line 338-360 region) and all call sites
Delete tokenizeIntent function and impact_hints construction
Strip L0/L1/L2 levelOrder switch and required/selectable booleans (already partly handled in TASK-005 A1, but A3 finishes plan-context-internal cleanup)
Strip dead L2 branch in shouldIncludeIndexItemForPath
Add new branch: when description_index.length <= 30, populate candidates_full_content (array of full markdown bodies for each entry) and skip selection_token generation
Add unit tests: ≤30 case returns candidates_full_content, >30 case retains selection_token
Confirm plan-context behavior with empty/seeded knowledge corpus

reference.examples: Mirror existing description_index assembly; add conditional branch by entry count

criteria: plan_context output lacks fields: selection_policy, required_stable_ids, ai_selectable_stable_ids, initial_selected_stable_ids, inferred_domain, intent_tokens, impact_hints
plan_context output gains: candidates_full_content when ≤30 candidates (single-stage degenerate mode)
Cocos hardcoded helpers (inferDomains/tokenizeIntent/inferImpactHints) deleted from plan-context.ts
L0/L1/L2 dead branches removed from buildDescriptionIndex and shouldIncludeIndexItemForPath
Unit tests cover both ≤30 degenerate mode and >30 two-stage mode

rationale.chosen_approach: Direct deletion of Cocos helpers + add conditional candidates_full_content; preserve public planContext signature
alternatives_considered: Always return full content (drop two-stage entirely)
decision_factors: Cocos hardcoding from werewolf-stub era; zero applicability in v2.0
Two-stage selection still valuable >30 for token economy
rationale.tradeoffs: ≤30 threshold is arbitrary; may revisit in rc.7+ based on actual KB size data

manual_checks: fabric serve + invoke fab_plan_context with 5-entry corpus → confirm candidates_full_content present
success_metrics: Test count for plan-context grows by ≥3 (degenerate + two-stage + dead-branch absence)

risks.description: candidates_full_content payload too large for ≤30 case
risks.mitigation: Test with realistic 30-entry corpus; if >50KB add per-entry size cap

key_functions.purpose: Either return full content or selection_token
